text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon skips our first day of training for the
Champions Cup. Instead, I find her by the river.

Smart Falcon's worries are laid bare. Caught up in
aiming for the top, she no longer enjoys the act
of performing, so I ask her to sing something on
the spot.

Our little concert helps Smart Falcon remember
her initial resolution—her original dream to simply
shine.

I reassure her that she's never truly lost that shine.
With newfound confidence, she looks ahead to
her next race.
